items.title: Israel counter-attacks Iran — strikes Mahshahr petrochemical complex (first energy site since April 8 ceasefire) + dismantles restored air defenses; IDF: 'unique materials critical for ballistic missile program'; 15 wounded, 0 killed; Netanyahu defied Trump
Iran announces halt of military offensive against Israel — condition: will resume if Israel strikes southern Lebanon or further aggression; announced minutes after Trump's 'immediate stop' call
Netanyahu announces halt of Israel strikes after Trump pressure — warns won't hesitate to resume if Iran launches more missiles; mutual halt but no formal ceasefire

Trump: 'I made Netanyahu stop' — Israel was preparing 'significant attack in Tehran' when Trump called; 'Bibi, you better be careful, or you will be on your own very soon'; blockade remains until Final Deal
Airspace reopens — Iran, Syria (Damascus International Airport), Iraq (after 72-hour closure); EASA advisory valid until June 10

Iran formally conditions peace on Lebanon ceasefire — demands: end hostilities in Lebanon + halt US blockade; every Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets diplomatic timeline for US-Iran agreement and Hormuz reopening
Oil prices cool after mutual halt: WTI +0.86% to $91.32, Brent +1.65% to $94.63 (earlier spike to $96.24); Hormuz June reopening 'unlikely', Fitch: end of July
Oil market: Brent retreats from $96.24 spike to $94.63 settlement — CNBC coverage
Hormuz June reopening 'unlikely' per analysts; Fitch estimates end of July — IndexBox analysis
Iran halt — CNN liveblog: both sides warn ready to resume
Iran halt — Washington Times: announced after Trump 'immediate stop' call
Mutual halt — Arab News: Trump 'looking to do an immediate ceasefire'
Trump 'I made Netanyahu stop' — MS NOW liveblog
Trump 'I made Netanyahu stop' — Times of Israel liveblog: Israel preparing 'significant attack in Tehran'
Israel strikes Mahshahr — JPost: IDF video shows strikes, 'unique materials critical for ballistic missile program'
Israel strikes Iran — Rappler: Netanyahu defied Trump
Iran conditions peace — CNBC: Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets Hormuz timeline
